title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Career Launcher Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Career Launcher Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Career Launcher Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Career Launcher Holdings Services:
Career Launcher Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher Holdings Services!
